concerns.text: The plan cites OSF/Parquet links (e.g., 'https://huggingface.co/datasets/cjziems/osf_loglikelihood/...') as potential sources for 'misinformation stimuli' (headlines/domains). These URLs point to log-likelihood or graph covariate data, not the raw stimulus text required for the simulation. Using these datasets would fail to provide the 'headline' and 'content_domain' variables needed for FR-001. The plan must identify a dataset containing actual misinformation headlines (e.g., a specific subset of the Misinformation Prompt Dataset or a verified news headline repository) rather than generic OSF links that do not match the modality.

The text states 'NO verified source found' for MPSD-v2 but then proceeds to list OSF links as 'Verified Sources Available' without confirming they contain the required headline/domain columns. This creates ambiguity about whether the cited resources are actually appropriate for the task. The plan should explicitly state which specific dataset (with URL) will be used for stimuli, or confirm that synthetic stimuli will be generated without any external source, rather than listing irrelevant OSF links as fallback options.
